title: Dummy Post: Streamlit Dashboard Patterns for ML Teams
excerpt: A lightweight post for testing software-productivity topics and end-to-end app documentation within the JSON blog system.

content.value: Dashboards are often the fastest way to validate whether an ML system is actually useful to non-ML stakeholders.
What a good internal dashboard does

import streamlit as st

st.title('Model Health')
st.metric('Latency p95', '184 ms')
st.metric('Error Rate', '0.7%')
